title: Introduction to castform
text: document introduction castform package. everything need download analyze historical climate data Department Environment Climate Change Canada (ECCC). https://climate.weather.gc.ca/historical_data/search_historic_data_e.html weather station analyses need : Download weather station data Put data executable databases Pull data analysis Print user friendly outputs castform package provides functions complete analysis.

title: Introduction to castform
text: function get_metadata() downloads latest station inventory list ECCC. input parameters required run function. run, function download station inventory list .csv file save backup .rda file. get_metadata() automatically update HLY_station_info store latest download filtering stations contain hourly data (stations HLY.First.Year HLY.First.Year NA values). HLY_station_info automatically loaded user’s global environment. HLY_station_info expected include key columns: stationName: name station. (Note: stations name different station ids.) Station.ID: unique identifier station Province: Canadian province territory station located. HLY.First.Year: first year available hourly data HLY.Last.Year: last year available hourly data station inventory list required download wrappers must first thing run analysis.

title: Introduction to castform
text: download wrappers require specific information station(s) user wants download. information can pulled metadata using station_lookup(). can search stations Province well start_year end_year hourly data collection.

title: Introduction to castform
text: following walk-throughs different download wrappers.

title: Introduction to castform
text: get_single_station_file() download single .csv file specified station stores month hourly weather data. goal larger download, good idea verify station information output directories using function. download station file must input either valid station_name station_id. parameters left unspecified, function make following defaults: year: Defaults first year hourly data collection (station) month: Defaults January (month = 1) root_folder: Defaults creating new folder called “station_data” current working directory function called download wrappers, resulting similar defaults across package. cases multiple stations name. occurs, R return list station names associated IDs. , re-run function input station_name station_id specify match.
code: get_single_station_file(station_name =  "discovery island",                         station_id = 27226,                         year = 1997,                         month = 1,                         root_folder = "station_data")

title: Introduction to castform
text: get_multiple_station_files() download multiple .csv files specified station. number files download specified using number_of_files download starting point specified using year month. downloading 10 files Discovery Island British Columbia download starting point January 1997. cases large amount files downloaded, R return list estimated number files downloaded, estimation space required, ask user confirmation download proceeds. total number files exceeds parallel_threshold (default = 50), download parallelized across several cores speed download.
code: get_multiple_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                            station_id = 27226,                            number_of_files = 10,                            year = 1997,                            month = 1,                            parallel_threshold = 50,                            root_folder = "station_data")

title: Introduction to castform
text: downloading available hourly station data Discovery Island British Columbia October 1999 year month left empty, default years available data province every month (1-12). downloads available hourly station data Discovery Island
code: get_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                   station_id = 27226,                   year = 1997,                   month = 10,                   parallel_threshold = 50,                   root_folder = "station_data") get_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                   station_id = 27226,                   parallel_threshold = 50,                   root_folder = "station_data")

title: Introduction to castform
text: Province territory can input full abbreviated names. downloading available hourly station data Prince Edward Island February 1980 year month left empty, default years available data province every month (1-12). downloads available hourly station data Prince Edward Island
code: province_station_files(province = "prince edward island",                        year = 1980,                        month = "february",                        parallel_threshold = 50,                        root_folder = "station_data") province_station_files(province = "prince edward island",                        parallel_threshold = 50,                        root_folder = "station_data")

title: Introduction to castform
text: , downloading hourly station data Discovery Island British Columbia 1997 1999. start_year end_year left empty, start_year default first year hourly data available data end_year default start_year, resulting one year downloads.
code: year_range_station_files(station_name = "discovery island",                          station_id = 27226,                          start_year = 1997,                          end_year = 1999,                          parallel_threshold = 50,                          root_folder = "station_data")

what: Download All Available Hourly Station Data
title: Introduction to castform
text: function downloads available historical hourly weather station data Canada result large download.

title: Introduction to castform
text: user run get_metadata(), download wrapper functions default using resulting Hourly_Station_Info. past version station list needs used, user can edit Hourly_Station_Info parameter within function.
code: province_station_files(province = "prince edward island",                        parallel_threshold = 50,                        root_folder = "station_data",                        HLY_station_info = "station_inventory_2026-03-23.rda")

title: Introduction to castform
text: build_station_database() can used create searchable database specified folder hourly weather station data. Input database names automatically spaces replaced underscores turned uppercase. output_dir root_folder left empty, data pulled package’s default data storage folder (“station_data”) user’s working directory database stored folder. Input output directories can specified editing parameters function builds database three tables: Weather: Stores weather conditions associated numeric codes Station: Stores weather station information using HLY_station_info Observation: Stores information downloaded station data (.csv) files
code: build_station_database <- function(db_name = "BC station data") build_station_database <- function(db_name = "BC_STATION_DATA",                                     output_dir = "castform_outputs",                                     root_folder = "downloaded_data/British_Columbia")

title: Introduction to castform
text: database created, users can use validate_database(). check created tables, list number observations within table, lists first five observations within Observation table. three tables: Weather, Station, Observation. Weather 54 records Station many records HLY_Station_Info Observation many records stored downloaded data files

title: Introduction to castform
text: data downloaded loaded onto database, users always perform exploratory data analyses. castform provides functions summarize visualize data. outputs exported .html files, users can copy results download .csv .pdf files. Input database names automatically spaces replaced underscores turned uppercase. Every EDA function three parameters: db_name = name database db_dir = directory database stored (default = “station_data_name_outputs”) output_dir = directory produced outputs stored (default = “station_data_name_outputs”) output_name = name produced .html .png outputs. left empty. default file name start “db_name” end related EDA function.

title: Introduction to castform
text: station_map() creates .png plots stations interest map Canada. metadata_stations set TRUE, db_name must left empty. function use HLY_Station_Info plot visualize stations hourly data available.
code: station_map(db_name =  "BC_STATION_DATA",             output_name = "bc station map") station_map(metadata_stations = TRUE,             output_name = "metadata station map")

title: Introduction to castform
text: data_missingness_table() creates table outlining expected actual data counts, along percentage missing data variable station.

title: Introduction to castform
text: data_ranges() creates table outlining average, minimum, maximum values variable station.

title: Introduction to castform
text: plot_yearly_means() creates plots outlining values variable time every year station active.

title: Introduction to castform
text: pull_missing_strings() identifies gaps missing strings data. creates table identify data missing stores length (hours), well start end date/time gap. also create interactive plot visualize gaps

title: Introduction to castform
text: Hours repeated data values can indicate faulty machinery data collection. pull_repeated_strings() identifies strings repeated values occur three hours . can indicate faulty machinery data collection. table stores length (hours) start end date/time repeated strings. also create interactive plot visualize strings. NOTE: take longer run larger datasets. Large datasets also require zooming plots see outputs else plot look empty.

title: Introduction to castform
text: verifying data, can now perform analysis detect extreme weather events. heatwave_detector() allows detection extreme heat events using user input temperature thresholds (Celcius). function uses ECCC’s definition extreme heat events, defines “events daily temperatures reached heat warning thresholds 2 consecutive days relief overnight”. use ECCC temperature thresholds, leave max_threshold min_threshold blank automatically applied. Temperature thresholds station climate rgions last updated April 18, 2026, using: https://www.canada.ca/en/environment-climate-change/services/environmental-indicators/extreme-heat-events.html. max_threshold min_threshold specified user, input values take priority applied. function table plot summarizing daily temperature averages. table stores logical information whether day crosses temperature thresholds whether considered heatwave. plot visualizes information plotting daily temperatures highlighting heatwave events occur.

title: Create Station Databases — build_station_database
text: Creates database using folder specified weather station data. automatically create three tables. Station information table using HLY_station_info, Weather table look weather conditions associated numeric code, Observation table made using downloaded station data (.csv) files.

title: Create Station Databases — build_station_database
code: build_station_database(   db_name = NULL,   HLY_station_info = NULL,   output_dir = "station_data",   root_folder = "station_data" )

title: Create Station Databases — build_station_database
text: db_name Character: name database HLY_station_info Station metadata output_dir created output directory database. left unchanged, store database within default root_folder root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory.

title: Get Multiple Station Files — get_multiple_station_files
text: station_name Character: name weather station interest. station_id Numeric Integer: unique station ID weather station interest. number_of_files Numeric Integer: number files user wishes download. year Numeric Integer: year data pull. left empty, default first year data collection particular station. month Numeric Integer: month data pull (1 - 12). left empty, default January (1). parallel_threshold Numeric Integer: required number files trigger parallel downloads. left unchanged, parallelization occur downloads 50 files . root_folder created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory. HLY_station_info Dataframe: Station metadata

title: Detect Extreme Heat Events (Heatwaves) — heatwave_detector
text: Scans downloaded data detect extreme heat events. temperature thresholds provided, use Environment Canada's definition extreme heat event (https://www.canada.ca/en/environment-climate-change/services/environmental-indicators/extreme-heat-events.html)

title: Detect Extreme Heat Events (Heatwaves) — heatwave_detector
code: heatwave_detector(   db_name = NULL,   max_threshold = NULL,   min_threshold = NULL,   db_dir = "station_data",   output_dir = "station_data" )

title: Detect Extreme Heat Events (Heatwaves) — heatwave_detector
text: db_name Character: name database max_threshold Numeric: Maximum temperature threshold extreme heat event min_threshold Numeric: Minimum temperature threshold extreme heat event db_dir Character: directory database, left unchanged, default package's default created directory "station_data". output_dir Character: created download folder file path. left unchanged, create new "station_data" folder working directory.

title: Detect Extreme Heat Events (Heatwaves) — heatwave_detector
text: Produces `.html` table plot output summarizing average daily temperatures flags extreme heat events based user input thresholds.
